topics.label: Engine & Connection
topics.description: create_engine, connect, and execute SQL. The engine manages database connections.

topics.label: ORM Models
topics.description: DeclarativeBase, mapped_column, relationship. Map Python classes to tables.

topics.label: Sessions & CRUD
topics.description: Session for transactions, add, query, filter, delete.

topics.label: Relationships
topics.description: ForeignKey, relationship, backref. One-to-many, many-to-many, one-to-one.

topics.label: Querying
topics.description: select, where, join, order_by, group_by. SQLAlchemy 2.0 style queries.

topics.label: Alembic Migrations
topics.description: Schema migrations with Alembic. alembic revision, upgrade, downgrade.
